category_sources: source_facts.description says Firebase command-line tools; official Firebase CLI docs describe tools for managing, viewing, and deploying Firebase projects.
display_name_sources: Official Firebase documentation uses Firebase CLI; official GitHub README title is Firebase CLI and MCP Server.
docs_sources: Official Firebase documentation has a dedicated CLI reference; official GitHub README points users to firebase.google.com documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Firebase CLI docs reference GitHub, and official firebase/firebase-tools repository describes the Firebase Command Line Interface tools.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official Firebase CLI docs describe managing and deploying Firebase projects, local emulators, hosting, and Firebase services.
